scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:firefox
scripts.test:chrome: env -u NO_COLOR bun run build && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e: env -u NO_COLOR bun run build && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:firefox: env -u NO_COLOR bun run build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=firefox
scripts.test:firefox:force: env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 bun run build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=firefox
